summary_en: Specific target metrics and horizon not disclosed in excerpt. Board resolution on 2026-05-14 addresses capital-cost and stock-price conscious management framework; detailed terms in attached materials.
title_en: Response toward realization of management conscious of capital cost and stock price
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-14, HAVIX CORPORATION's board of directors adopted a resolution regarding measures to realize management conscious of capital cost and stock price. The company has conducted analysis of its current position and identified challenges. The filing announces the board's decision to implement a framework toward sustainable corporate value enhancement, with detailed terms and specific targets deferred to attached materials (not included in this excerpt). The precise financial metrics, performance horizons, and payout-ratio floors, if any, are not accessible from the first two pages.
